title: Reaper Performance Modpack
description: A simple modpack with various mods to make the game perform better. Play with a high framerate, but keep everything Minecraft-typical or activate a shader (pre-installed) to get more out of the game.
body:
Reaper Performance Modpack

A new creation of my Mountain Performance Pack.

Use of Quilt / Fabric for version 1.20.4.

A simple modpack with various mods to make the game perform better. Play with a high framerate, but keep everything Minecraft-typical or activate a shader (pre-installed) to get more out of the game.

Tested with an Nvidia RTX 3060 & Ryzen 7 3700X. - Up to 1700 FPS.

If you have problems, write me on Discord: Gerrxt(#2530)
